title: Conscious Software Design - Consciousness Levels
summary: I have updated my tutorial about conscious software design to include a list of 4 different conscioussness levels I believe developers and architects tend to operate on: Oblivious, unconscious, subconscious and conscious.
content:
I have updated my tutorial about conscious software design to include a list of 4 different conscioussness
                levels I believe developers and architects tend to operate on: Oblivious, unconscious, subconscious and conscious.
